name: X: Open Inbox
description: Open the authenticated X DM inbox in a fresh tab and return whether the inbox shell, the compose surface, or the X Chat passcode-onboarding gate is present. Use to confirm inbox reachability before calling a DM-send or DM-reply workflow. Do not use to read individual DM threads (use `x_open_dm_thread` for that).

browser_automation.description: Opens https://x.com/i/chat in a fresh tab and waits for the inbox shell, the DM composer, or the passcode onboarding gate.

sequences.name: x_open_inbox
sequences.description: Open the X Chat inbox in a fresh tab and snapshot its state.

steps.name: Open the X Chat inbox in a fresh tab
Wait for the inbox shell or onboarding gate
Read the inbox or onboarding state
steps.script: return { url: location.href, thread_link_count: document.querySelectorAll("main a[href*='/messages/'], main a[href*='/i/chat/']").length, composer_present: !!document.querySelector("div[data-testid='dmComposerTextInput'], div[role='textbox'][data-testid='dmComposerTextInput']"), pin_onboarding_present: !!document.querySelector("button[data-testid='pin-onboarding-setup-now']"), new_dm_button_present: !!document.querySelector("a[data-testid='NewDM_Button']") };

help.summary: Open the X DM inbox in a fresh tab and report whether the inbox shell or the passcode onboarding gate is showing.
notes: If `pin_onboarding_present` is true, finish the X Chat passcode setup manually before using DM-send or DM-reply workflows.
Opens a fresh tab so other workflows can run in parallel against the same browser session.
